title: PVC Smooth Shower Hose 1.5M / 59 Inch with Anti-Twist Brass Connections - Universal Replacement Shower Head Hose, Flexible, Kink and Leak Proof
features: ✦ HEAVY-DUTY SHOWER HOSE 1.5m: The 59" / 150cm long multilayered shower hose is made of sturdy PVC, woven with heat-resistant polyester yarn, and covered by a scratch-resistant surface. The standard 1/2" brass connector fits Global 1/2" interface and most standard handheld shower heads.

✦ 360-DEGREE ROTATION: The flexible hose has solid anti-twist nuts and leak-proof swivel connectors, so it can rotate without kinking. This way, your hose will function properly and have a good flow rate.
✦ DIY INSTALLATION: With the shower accessories you can install the hose on your own. Screw the hose onto the shower unit and the shower head. Seal it using the washers.
✦ EASY TO MAINTAIN: The smooth silver surface will prevent corrosion, dirt, and mold build-up. One simple wipe is enough to keep your shower head and hose sparkling clean after use.

✦ SHOWER HOSE FOR A LIFETIME: This DIY, easy-to-clean, and stylish PVC shower hose is a stylish and practical solution for your bathroom. Feel confident in your purchase, as the product has a 5-year guarantee.

✦ NOT FOR BIDET USE: With bidets, the hose is exposed to constant water pressure, necessitating the use of specialized bidet hoses. This shower hose is NOT intended for use with bidets. Using the hose with bidets may cause damage and void the warranty.
description: Product Description Upgrade Your Shower Experience with YOSSEE PVC Smooth Shower Hose 1.5 M/59 Inch Elevate your shower routine with the YOSSEE PVC Smooth Shower Hose, designed to provide durability, flexibility, and convenience. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this 59-inch (150cm) long hose offers a seamless shower experience like no other. YOSSEE Shower Hose 59" will help you to Say goodbye to: Leaky connections Frustrating kinks that interrupt your shower flow Difficult cleaning and maintenance This high-quality hose is designed for maximum flexibility, durability, and ease of use. Constructed from sturdy PVC material and woven with heat-resistant polyester yarn, our shower hose ensures long-lasting performance. Previous page Smooth and Shiny The shiny and smooth surface adds a touch of elegance to your bathroom. Reinforcement Layers The hose is made of 5 layers safe, phthalate-free PVC. It is reinforced with STRONG polyester yarn. Anti-twist Nuts 360-DEGREE ROTATION: The flexible hose has solid anti-twist nuts, so it can rotate without kinking. Brass Connections The brass connectors are corrosion-resistant and provide extra durability. Easy to Clean YOSSEE shower hose is MORE HYGENIC than the traditional models. It won’t get rusty or mouldy. Next page Here's what makes the Yossee Shower Hose the perfect choice: 1 Smooth and Shiny 2 Reinforcement Layers 3 Anti-Twist Nuts 4 Brass Connections 5 Easy to Clean Universal Shower Hose Replacement Standard 1/2" Brass Connector fits Global 1/2" Interface YOSSEE Shower Hose will fit most standard handheld shower heads. This DIY, easy-to-clean and stylish PVC shower hose has all it takes to withstand the test of time. It is also a GOOD FIT for gravity-fed and electrical showers, bidets, etc. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
